_README: Dev/build-time LLM paraphrases for naturalness ONLY — the GOLD never changes. Key = '<seed>:<item_id>'. Used only with `gen_coverage.py --paraphrase` (default OFF; the cached set is what ships). Each paraphrase is re-gated at apply time (gold still resolves, no name leak, still UNIQUE to the same gold, not malformed); a failing paraphrase falls back to the deterministic template. To extend: dump the per-item capability SEED, have an LLM reword it WITHOUT seeing the gold, append here, regenerate with the same --seed (byte-stable, no live LLM). Populated for seed 0 as a representative sample.
